change_summary: N2 verifier v1: fully symbolic proportionality check (general 3x3 gamma inverse + sqrt discriminant) via sympy simplify
expected: all 6 cross products simplify to 0 and boost factor reduces to a pure number within the 10-min test budget
observed: timeout(540s) killed the run inside sympy simplify/radsimp on radical-bearing rational functions of 10 symbols
root_cause: expression swell: simplify on cross products containing sqrt(disc) of a generic 3-metric inverse is exponential in practice; full symbolic closure not needed for the claim
fix_hypothesis: v2: exact Rational-point identity testing (Schwartz-Zippel style, zero float error) + 4-GPU float64 mass-sampling falsification in JAX; cap wall clock at 540s internally

change_summary: N2 verifier v2: exact Rational-point identity testing + 4-GPU (A100) float64 falsification sweep in JAX; replaces full-symbolic simplify
N3 verifier v1: asserted w- and psi0 are built from the double INCOMING-null derivative (d_t - d_s)^2

metric.name: simplify_equals_zero
metric.value: psi0 - c*(d_t-d_s)^2(F1-iF2) != 0 for any constant c

expected: psi0 = c (d_t - d_s)^2 (F1 - i F2) off-shell
observed: psi0 = (1/4)(d_t + d_s)^2 (F1 + i F2) exactly — the OUTGOING null-direction operator (which annihilates outgoing waves f(t-s)) and the m m (not mbar mbar) metric component
root_cause: null-leg labeling: the incoming-mode extractor is l.d (outgoing null vector), not k.d — consistent with paper-1's (r^2 l-ring d)^(L+1) BC operator; also h_mm vs h_mbarmbar convention flipped with it
fix_hypothesis: v2: w-(Z4c) := (d_t + d_s)^2 gamma_AB^TF; identity W_AB = 4(psi0 mbar_A mbar_B + cc) with pure-number constant determined by the verifier, off-shell; GPU sweep with independent (omega, k) since identity is off-shell

change_summary: N3 verifier v2: corrected null-leg convention (l.d extracts incoming modes), real-function conjugate collapse; exact off-shell identity + 4-GPU off-shell Fourier sweep
N1 verifier v1 + zccm package test v1: assertion sign on At-recovery residual (+gt/3 trAt instead of -gt/3 trAt); float() concretization inside jitted device_checks
expected: all symbolic identities vanish; GPU test runs jitted
observed: At recovery residual is -(2/3) gt trAt with the wrong-sign assertion; float() of tracer raised ConcretizationTypeError
root_cause: verifier-side assertion sign (the map itself is exact: At_back - At = -(gt/3) tr_gt At, vanishing for trace-free At); host-side float() inside jit
fix_hypothesis: flip assertion sign; return jnp scalars from the jitted function and convert outside

change_summary: N1 verifier v2 (exact full-symbolic, rational-only, 3.9s) + zccm 4-GPU package test v2 (22.3s, 1,048,576 states)
N4 verifier v1: used longitudinal h_xx as the constraint-sourcing negative control

metric.name: simplify_equals_zero
metric.value: M_x(h_xx) == 0 — control did not source constraints

observed: pure h_xx(t,x) gives H = 0 and M_i = 0 identically — it is a GAUGE channel, not a constraint-violating one
root_cause: mode-taxonomy slip: with dependence on (t,x) only, M_x = d_x K_xx - d_x(tr K) cancels for h_xx; the constraint-sourcing boundary channel is the VECTOR sector h_xA (M_A = -(1/2) d_x dot h_xA)
fix_hypothesis: use h_xy as negative control; record the refined 4-way channel taxonomy (TT=physical, h_xx=gauge, h_xA=constraint-vector, trace=constraint-scalar) in the formulation document

change_summary: N4 verifier v2: vector-channel negative control; TT-orthogonality + gauge-channel taxonomy + 4-GPU sweep
N5 verifier: gauge-channel decoupling (exact) + reflection model on P1 eq:eomgammasA (naive Sommerfeld vs boundary-adapted operator) + 4-GPU sweep
N6 verifier v1: incoming-constraint check used absolute threshold 0.1 ignoring the (2k)^2 amplitude scaling at small k
expected: incoming-mode residual bounded away from 0 by 0.1
observed: residual exactly (2k)^2 a >= 0.02 for k >= 0.1 — physics correct, threshold sloppy
root_cause: verifier-side absolute threshold instead of the analytic normalization
fix_hypothesis: normalize residual by (2k)^2 a; ratio must equal 1 exactly

change_summary: N6 verifier v2 + zccm.boundary module + explicit 10-mode BC table document: mode count, P1 reduction, wire-through, transparency all pass
N7 LF sketch verifier: exact roots/determinants + uniform Kreiss bound + datum-independence + 4-GPU sweep (one cosmetic fail: string-sorted root pairing, fixed to set match)

model1d v1: characteristic decomposition labels swapped (q_out <-> q_in eigenvector combinations); no left-edge inflow BC; CCM run reused the outgoing initial pulse; R ratio missing the (1-b)/(1+b) amplitude factor
expected: q_in == 0 for pure outgoing data; R_Sommerfeld ~ 0.095
root_cause: for u = f(t - x/c+), Pi = -c+ Phi, so the outgoing-vanishing combination is Pi + (1+b)Phi (= the P1 BC operator, consistent with N5/N7) — my q_in/q_out assignments were the transposed eigenvector pair; additionally char amplitudes scale as 2/(1-b) vs 2/(1+b) so R_u = ratio*(1-b)/(1+b); left edge had no inflow BC
fix_hypothesis: swap definitions; add left-edge no-inflow BC Pi[0]=(1-b)Phi[0]; zero initial data for the injection run; correct the ratio factor

change_summary: model1d v2: BC reconstruction fixed but characteristic speed assignment still mirrored — assumed outgoing speed 1+b; the PDE factors as (d_t + (1-b)d_x)(d_t - (1+b)d_x), so outgoing (toward x=0) speed is 1-b and incoming 1+b for this sign convention
observed: identical results across BC kinds; left-eigenvector check (1, 1+b)A != lambda (1, 1+b) exposes the mirrored assignment
root_cause: orientation/sign: left eigenvectors of A = [[2b, 1-b^2],[1, 0]] are (1, 1-b) with speed 1+b (LEFT-moving = incoming) and (1, -(1+b)) with speed 1-b (RIGHT-moving = outgoing); analytic Sommerfeld R in this orientation is the b -> -b mirror of N5: b(1+b)/((1-b)(2+b))
fix_hypothesis: q_in = Pi + (1-b) Phi (target of the BC), q_out = Pi - (1+b) Phi (preserved); initial outgoing data Pi = -(1-b) Phi; datum 2 G'/(1+b); R = q_in/q_out with no extra factor; t_end = 20 (slower outgoing speed 0.7)

change_summary: model1d v3 + test v2: coherent characteristic orientation (outgoing speed 1-b), Bjorhus enforcement preserving q_out, left-edge no-inflow, vacuum start for injection; all four dynamical checks pass

USER REVIEW FINDING: the N3 dictionary (paper eqs. 16-17) is linearized — derived for a TT perturbation of flat space; the formulation must be exact (paper-3's GH analog w- = 2(psi0' mbm + cc) is exact tetrad algebra on the full Weyl tensor, not perturbation theory)
expected: physical BC rows valid at full nonlinearity
observed: rows 1-2 stated through (dt+ds)^2 gamma^TF — a linearized object; valid only as the flat-frame limit
root_cause: the dictionary was built on the linearized Riemann contraction instead of the exact electric/magnetic Weyl decomposition; the exact statement is U-(m,m) = (E + sigma eps(s)B)(m,m) = kappa psi0 (pure Weyl algebra) with E, B realized from the Z4c state via Gauss-Codazzi (on-shell vacuum)
fix_hypothesis: N3-exact: (A) determine and verify the exact scalar identity on a generic 10-parameter Weyl tensor; (B) recover the linearized eqs. 16-17 as the on-shell flat limit; (C) verify the Z4c-variable realization nonperturbatively on Kerr-Schild Schwarzschild via JAX autodiff (4D-curvature route vs 3+1 route); update BC rows 1-2, boundary module, and the paper

change_summary: N3-exact verifier: generic-Weyl exact identity + psi4-bar partner + dyad completeness + linearized on-shell limit + Schwarzschild nonperturbative two-route check (autodiff); package and N6 verifier retargeted to the exact U^- object
